name: vue-vben-admin
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ripgrep fd-find bat fzf jq tree ncdu lsof iproute2 procps netcat-openbsd dnsutils less unzip && sudo ln -sf /usr/bin/fdfind /usr/local/bin/fd && sudo ln -sf /usr/bin/batcat /usr/local/bin/bat && sudo apt-get clean && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && corepack enable && pnpm --version && python3 --version
